site_summary: legalser.com has healthy public crawl and advertising endpoints, but sitemap freshness signals trail its July publication schedule.
technical_constraints: Preserve the existing canonical host and single AdSense loader.
Map the active sitemap owner before rebuilding it.
Do not remove either Naver verification token before ownership is proven.
Do not rewrite article text while correcting technical metadata.

site_topic_profile.site_topic: plain-English legal terminology and legal-information guides
site_topic_profile.primary_audience: readers seeking general legal vocabulary guidance
tone_constraints: do not make jurisdiction-specific legal claims without editorial review

blog_index_findings.evidence: This audit verified home, a sampled post, sitemap, feed, llms.txt, and ads.txt; it did not render the blog archive at responsive breakpoints.
